summary:
ECONOMIC VISIONS AND CRYPTOCURRENCY: Brandon discusses the necessity of praying for the economy going into 2025, specifically noting political shifts regarding cryptocurrency. Brandon recounts a vision where the current chaotic crypto market stabilizes into five main pillars that will form the foundation of a new blockchain industrial revolution. Brandon stresses the importance of establishing fair taxation and privacy laws to prevent unconstitutional government spying, warning that these developments are laying the groundwork for a one-world government and a digital beast system. Brandon also encourages continued intercession for Judge Torres in the ongoing SEC and Ripple case.

GEOPOLITICAL DISTRACTIONS AND BRICS ALLIANCE: Brandon warns that current global conflicts involving Ukraine, Russia, and Israel are media distractions orchestrated to hide shadowy political maneuvers. Brandon emphasizes a prophetic warning from June 17th about a wealth transfer that requires acting before news becomes public. Brandon describes a rising alliance among BRICS nations, including Cuba, Venezuela, North Korea, and Iran, who are uniting against the United States dollar and the SWIFT system. Brandon notes that these nations are being promised relief from Western sanctions and predicts the impending fall of the American dollar standard to make way for a new digital beast system.

PLAGUES AND TRIBULATION VISIONS: Brandon shares intense visions of future catastrophic events, including unusual animal behavior in Yellowstone and major earthquakes. Brandon describes a vivid scene where Donald Trump is kneeling and weeping in prayer over a plague hitting America that affects animals like dogs, cows, and birds. Brandon details specific locations from his visions, such as people lining up for food rations outside a Target and Lowe's on Bryant street, and makeshift military hospital tents set up in a Sprouts parking lot near a Methodist church. Brandon identifies the season as autumn due to yellow leaves and completely empty NFL football stadiums, suggesting a timeline looking toward 2027 for a European plague involving rats. Brandon also mentions seeing black Hummers with blue lights and pulse weapons stored at an Edmond National Guard facility near Guthrie.

PROPHETIC TIMELINES AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon provides specific prophetic timeframes, highlighting September and the period between Rosh Hashanah as a time of great acceleration and birthing pains. Brandon discusses conversations regarding the rapture, suggesting a critical window aligning with the next Shemitah cycle in 2028 and 2029. Brandon emphasizes an upcoming massive wealth transfer involving cryptocurrency, gold, and silver, recounting an instance where a widow missed a fourteen million dollar opportunity by ignoring divine guidance. Brandon urges believers not to hoard their wealth but to use it to fund a massive global harvest of souls before the end times fully commence.

DIVINE PROTECTION AND INTERCESSION: Brandon exhorts followers to embed Psalms 91 and 23 into their hearts for divine protection against upcoming plagues and financial shaking. Brandon openly shares personal health struggles with low testosterone and weight but affirms a commitment to speaking divine health and healing over his body. Brandon emphasizes the power of targeted prayer, mentioning intercessions for Donald Trump's spiritual conversion, as well as praying for Hollywood figures like Mel Gibson, Kanye West, the Kardashians, Justin Bieber, and Billie Eilish. Brandon concludes by encouraging believers to ask for massive miracles, creative healings for conditions like autism, and immense financial blessings to completely transform their lives and communities.
rawData: [July 17, 2025]-[Key locations revealed in prayer about the coming plague]-[https://youtu.be/BW7DXgEMZHM]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, that last video was pretty heavy, wasn't it? I appreciate everybody sticking through it and praying. You know, people said, 'Brandon, what did you see?' A lot of the things that the Lord showed me were very heavy. But when I was looking into 2025 and the rest of this year, we have prayer assignments to pray for our economy. Now, we see the Senate—I believe it was the House or the Senate—12 people flipped in the Republican party going against crypto. So, we have a lot already to pray about if we just start here and start praying over it. We see them saying, 'Hey, they're butting heads and passing these bills.' But in my spirit, this is the foundation they have to get right. They don't want to just hurry up and do everything really quickly and make bad laws concerning these things. So, we want this done correctly, but we don't want the enemy coming in and trying to put a kink in the hose further with the Senate and the House of the United States of America. We want the flow to flow, but we want it to be a good flow, and we want it to be stable. Because what they do right now is laying this foundation, like the Lord told me back in February. He said they will lay, in the days ahead, they will lay a foundation, and what seems like the wild, wild west right now will become stability. I saw all these cryptos falling in the days ahead, and it was like stars, but there were five main pillars that rose up in the days ahead and were the foundation of the blockchain in all that is going to happen in crypto and the new industrial revolution. That is what I saw. So as we see the wild, wild west become a stable society, we will have to pray this through because there is a lot there to pray through as far as laying a foundation of good laws so it's taxed right and it's fair. You know, people shouldn't be able to scam people by hiding things, and we don't want them being able to spy on us. We want them to be able to look into people who are smuggling things and doing things that are crooked, but at the same time, there are a lot of boundaries that need to be set in place so that they are not able to spy on you and do things that are unconstitutional. You have a right to privacy in a lot of areas, and I feel that that's what's being done right now. Where is the line? And I know it's going into a one-world government, a one-world society, a digital platform for a beast system. So, that beast system is being talked about right now. Isn't that amazing? We're living in these last days, and we're seeing these major things take place, yet people are just clueless to what is really going on. But I'm excited about some of this. We still pray for Judge Torres. We're still interceding and believing God that she will let the SEC and Ripple come to an agreement and do all the things they need to do to get it finalized, and we look at that. But what I thought was interesting, whenever the Lord showed me, as you're seeing the war, as you're seeing the stuff going on with Ukraine, Russia, Israel, and the peace agreement, He said, 'As you're paying attention to this hand, what is being a distraction in the media?' Oh, an escalation of war. You know, if anybody joins up with Russia, we'll put a 100% tariff on them. Now we're going to fund Ukraine. You've got 50 days and all this stuff going on, the Epstein list, and all this stuff going on. What's happening over here? What's happening over here? Why is everybody distracted with this hand? The sleight of hand is going on with this hand. And that's what the Lord warned us about in prayer on June 17th. He warned us about this on June 17th and told us, 'You need to pay attention to what's happening in the midnight hour, what's happening in the dark and in the shadows. For what's going on in the shadows will soon come out in the light, and everyone will see it in the days ahead. But you will miss a great opportunity for the transfer of wealth of the wicked in your life if you're waiting for it to come into the public eye; you're waiting too late.' He said, 'You have to see what's coming in the news before it's in the news. For when it's in the news, it's too late.' So, He was telling me, 'There's a great missed opportunity if you're not listening to Me right now.' And I told Diana, you know, we always pray as a family, and I don't want to miss the opportunity because I'm too focused on this hand over here. 'Oh, what's going on? Oh, no, we've got to pray for Ukraine, everything.' And so, if you're praying for the war in Ukraine, you're praying for this stuff, you're praying behind. We need to pray for what is already coming, what is going to come in the outcome with the five-card draw. And what the Lord showed me as we try to put up boundaries saying, 'Hey, BRICS, you're not going to do this, BRICS.' You know, like he's all saying anybody who joins BRICS is going to get a 10% tariff on top of what they already have if you're part of BRICS. So, he's trying to combat BRICS. And what I tell you, they're just biding their time, trying to just get through his presidency of what they're wanting to do, saying, 'Listen, you've got three and a half years left, right?' holding their cards. But I said, as he provokes, as he does this stuff, they were laughing at him behind closed doors and they said, 'Haha, Trump, you won't control us. Haha, Trump, you're not going to tell us what to do.' And I saw Cuba. How many times have I told Braden? I said, 'Go through each one of the videos and see how many times the Lord has brought up Cuba, Cuba, Cuba, Cuba.' Watch Cuba with biological things, with the Russian nuclear subs. What is it the Lord is warning us about to pray about Cuba? For there will be a time when they extend them an olive branch of peace, saying, 'Listen, if you join up with us, we'll take you out from underneath the Western boot.' Venezuela, if you join up with us, we're going to take you out from underneath the Western boot. North Korea said, 'We give an alliance, an unconditional alliance to Russia for military or whatever they need. We're here for you.' There are articles all over the place. I saw a video where Kim Jong Un said, 'We're here regardless of whatever it takes to help Russia.' Why? Because he's been promised something. He's been promised something: 'We're going to help you get out from underneath the Western boot and all the sanctions and all these things if you join up with us and help us.' I'm telling you what I've heard by the Spirit of God. And the Lord told me, He said, 'You're going to see the same thing with Iran, the same thing with all this stuff.' And I'm telling you all, we're seeing a new alliance, a new BRICS nation rise up to come against the dollar, to come against the euro, to come against these things—the SWIFT system with a new digital platform in the days ahead. And it will be very bad for what I saw financially for America. We will lose in the days ahead the dollar standard. It's in the way for the beast system. It will not be the beast system dollar standard. It will be the dollar. It will be the beast system. So, we will see the falling of the dollar standard in the days ahead. I don't know how long—I pray it's not right now. I mean, you know that it's terrible. I don't want to see these things, but I do want to see my Lord and Savior come back. And that's part of the system that's going to happen because the Bible tells us. So, we see those things, and it's happening right now as we speak, as this video is going on. We see the major earthquake starting to take off. People are sending me things about the bears, the grizzly bears, and Yellowstone and mountain lions, and there's all kinds of things going on. You try to ask, "Is this hype or whatever? Is there something really to this?" And it depends on who you're listening to, really, quite frankly. There's a lot of it out there, but I think it's interesting that all the grizzly bears are walking together. I've seen these videos people are sending to me. Have you ever seen black bears and brown bears and all of them running like in a pack? If I was in that car, I'd be freaking out watching that. They're aggressive little critters. We see about the elk. We've seen it. I've seen it; people send me stuff now. So, it's really interesting because a lot of you are sending a lot of stuff to Diana and me. She gets the emails. She goes, "Brennon, did you see this? Did you see that?" I'm like, "Hey, babe, that's cool." So, it's fun, all the little things you all send now, trying to keep us updated on the news. And Diana said, "Hey, I saw this today. Did you see this?" I said, "Wow, it's cool." So, y'all are trying to help us out. I appreciate it. So, we saw that. What did the Lord show me? I saw the red carpet. Now, there is that long hall where he always gives his speeches—Obama's given his speeches there. It looks like a long hall; there's a red rug there. That's where he was praying. There's gold on the edges. And I saw him on his knee, weeping before the Lord, addressing the American people because of the plague that hits the nation. He looked skinnier in the vision. He wasn't as plump in the belly, but he looked skinnier, looking like he's trying to eat right. He had his hand on his knee and his head like a Tim Tebow stance, kind of. That's the way I want to say—he was like Tebow doing like that with his hand on his head and his knee, and he was weeping before the Lord in the vision, travailing for America. I saw the plague again. I saw the virus. But at this time, I saw that it affected dogs, it affected cows, it affected the birds, and it was spreading throughout everything, and there was nothing they could do to stop it. And I'm going to show you a little clip right now that I went to the location of where I tried to tell you all: the Sprouts, the Methodist church, Target, and the Lowe's, and what I was trying to see. And then I'm going to show you another location of where I saw in the tribulation, where the Hummers were with the blue lights and all that—where they store them during the tribulation. It was a barbed wire fence, and I remember seeing it when Jesus took me there. So I told Braden today, "I want to drive down and show them the Target store where I saw the people lined up during the plague trying to get handouts for food." They had little sacks of food they were passing out at this Target, and the line started right here at this door. It wasn't at that door; it was at this door in the vision that the Lord showed me yesterday. Now, this is the second time the Lord has shown me people lined up, spaced out, trying to get food rations from this Target in the future. I don't know why—it's interesting when the Lord shows you certain places—and he showed me this. So, the line went all the way down, and it goes all the way in front of this Lowe's right here in the street. It goes all the way down. There's no cars moving around; the parking lots were barren in the vision. There was nobody driving around. The line goes all the way down in front of this Lowe's, all the way to the street corner, which you'll see in just a second. I know it's kind of bad because of all this traffic here, but it goes all the way to the street corner, to the street called Bryant, and it turns right. There's probably a couple thousand people in that line all the way down, and it goes clear down, and it stops right here on this sidewalk. That is where I saw it, and people were lined up, but they were all in nice clothes. They were dressed up really nice, as far as they didn't look dirty or whatever, like normal people. But I just thought it was kind of interesting in the vision what I was seeing, even with this last one about the plague and how people were trying to get sack food—they were trying to get their food rations there. Now, I'm going to take you to the Sprouts where I saw the tent city and the church. So, in this parking lot right here is the tent city. Okay, so the tents are there. It wouldn't be really a city, but it's like a place for medical, because all the hospitals were full and they had no place to put all of the sick people. So, they set up tents in the vision of what the Lord showed me. They set up tents in this Sprouts parking lot, and they're makeshift military tents all spread out here with cots. All this was all tents, like military tents. And you could see cots all in this parking lot. There was no longer a grocery store; the grocery store was not being used, but they were using it for medical purposes right here in this parking lot, right here in the vision. So, when I was in the spirit, I could see this again. I was driving on this road right here, and I was driving down right here, and I could see this Sprouts parking lot just like I'm driving right here, and I could see this Methodist church. You see it, son, right here. You could see that Methodist church, and that was in the vision. And this tree right here, this big tree on my right right here—you see this tree? It had yellow leaves in it. That's why I knew it was fall. That tree right there in the vision, with this little school, this territorial school—that tree right there had yellow leaves, and it was all turning for the fall. This tree right here, that's how I knew, of course, it was fall time. But I just thought, "Wow." Because when I'm driving and looking at this church, and I'm at this stoplight, and I see those makeshift tents, those military tents, that yellow tree, and this right here—that was all in the vision. And as I kept driving in the vision, I could see this Target coming up with the Lowe's and the people lined up outside trying to get food. And that's what I was seeing in the spirit as I was praying and went inside the vision. It was so clear in yesterday's video. Now, folks, I'm telling you, when I see things like this, it was very heavy. It was very heavy, what I was seeing and what the Lord was showing me. There were no cars driving around; there wasn't anybody hardly around. You could see people trying to get food, but the military tents—that was what freaked me out, and it was a hospital. This is another place that I saw in the tribulation. This is where they will store the Hummers. The people that I told you had like black outfits on, and they had the little sound machines that were knocking people down with the electric pulse gun thing. This is where some of the headquarters is for this city in Edmond where we are. This is one of the places that I saw in the tribulation where they store the Hummers and the military stuff. This is where I was at, and I'm going to go right to it and show you all the location of what I saw in the tribulation. That right there, this National Guard place is where they keep all the stuff. You see that, the Edmond National Guard? All that up there is where I saw the Black Hummers. All those parking places were full of black Hummers, and they had the blue lights. That was the main, major place that I saw in the Tribulation where they store stuff. So, I don't know why the Lord showed all that to me, but it's just what we saw when I went to the Tribulation with Him. And that was one of the places. And this is 20 miles. Well, yeah, it's about 15 to 20 miles from Guthrie, from the major place that I saw all the people gathered around the temple worshiping the Antichrist on Fridays. So, what do you think about that? That's pretty interesting, huh? Because I told Braden and Diana, "Let's go there and let's film it." So, Braden was helping me, Diana was helping me. We filmed that location so you all could see that. The other part of it was the Lord said, "Pay attention to the frost concerning this year, concerning 2025." He said, "Pay attention to when the first frost will be." He said, "September will be a time to remember for great change. A great acceleration of things will start to take place from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah. The birthing pains will start to increase to a point where you're not going to recognize the world." Folks, the Lord showed me. He said, "This is the beginning of great sorrows. This is the beginning. You're going to start to see where the labor pains, where the harvesters and the sowers are going hand in hand. You're going to start to see a great transfer of the wealth of the wicked." And even during that time frame, I don't want to skip around, but I'm going to right now because I'm remembering things. During that vision, when I saw the yellow tree, I'm going to go back to that. I saw football stadiums. And football is not—I'm talking about your World Cup. A lot of people say, "Brandon, you're talking about the World Cup." No, I'm talking about American football—Cowboys, you know, the San Francisco 49ers, whoever your team is. The NFL is what I was talking about, not the World Cup. So, I forget everybody calls football something different everywhere, you know, because some people say soccer is football, which we call American football. I'm talking about like the OU football or college football. And this was our American football. What the Lord was showing me was major stadiums empty in the fall, with people not going to them during the plague, and I saw them completely empty. And that was another sign to me that it was in the fall that this was taking place—the leaves, the football stadiums. And He was trying to tell me a time frame when we should be paying attention to something major that was going to try to take place, but not this year. I need to make that clear: it's not 2025. I believe I was looking into 2027, trying to mess with the economy, and I saw it with China, with rats using things, and it started in Europe. I want to say that it wasn't about America at the time; it started in Europe. This plague will start in Europe, and it was with rats. So, that's whenever I said, "Lord, can we stop some of these things? Lord, how much of this can we stop? What is it?" You know, because there are certain things that I know, with the prophetic gifting of what the Lord's given me as a watchman, there are a lot of things that He says, "Brandon, you bring it before the people and we pray and we bring this down." Now, is this part of the end times? I believe so. Yes, with all my heart, I believe it. If it talks about it in the Bible—plagues and pestilence, wars and rumors of wars in Matthew 24—we're not going to stop it. Those things will not be altered other than I believe that we have a divine protection. Ladies and gentlemen, this is what the Lord told me about, and I told Diana—we've been talking about this for a long time—getting Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 inside of your heart. If you go over what He said in His word, He will protect you underneath the shelter of His wings. His word and His truth will be a shield and a buckler to you. I believe if you get that word down inside of you as a firm foundation, a pillar, goodness and mercy will follow you all the days of your life. If you don't have that, I told you, if you're lukewarm, the devourer is coming to your house. And I tell you that in urgency to tell you it's not time to play church anymore. It's time to wake up, for Jesus Christ is standing at the door. And many people are living a lukewarm lifestyle. They think, "Well, grace, grace, grace," and I believe in grace with all my heart, but it does not give you a license to sin. It does not give you a license to say, "I'm going to live the way I want to live." You can live in grace, but don't abuse it and have an attitude of, "I'm going to just live the way I want to live." We must live as holy as we can by saying, "Hey, Lord, here am I. Send me." Now, if you mess up, folks, I understand people skin their knee. But we don't have a license just to practice sin. We don't have a license to practice it. We have a license to practice holiness, and we walk with Him as closely as we can. "Father, I thank you, Lord, for your mercy is good, and your mercies are new every single day. Great is your faithfulness to me." But it doesn't mean... I had a friend say, "You know, brother, it's under grace. I can go to the strip clubs and I can go out and find a hooker, and it's all under grace. God's forgiven my past, my present, and my future, and I can go..." I said, "You can't do that." "Well, it's under grace." And he would truly do it. He'd go to strip clubs and he would have hookers and all this stuff. I'm telling you, folks, that is deception. You cannot live that way and think you're going to make the rapture. You cannot live that way and think you're going to make heaven. You have to live purified before Him, without spot or wrinkle. It's time to come up higher with the fire. And I just want to encourage you all today because of some of the things I've seen in the last video. It was heavy. And as I saw before, Donald Trump getting shot this time last year when that whole word came out about his ear, and he was radically converted in the baptism of the Holy Spirit. But I saw the darkness that was all over America. And as he began to pray and intercede in the Oval Office with the pastors, with the teachers, or whoever these men were, that darkness lifted above the tree line. It did not go away, but I could see the darkness... as we interceded for the nation, I saw the darkness lift above the trees. And I'm telling you all, that's what it's going to take in these last days: a praying president. And the Lord told me, He said, "Brandon, you will be so thankful in the days ahead that you have President Trump, for he will become a praying president, even more radically born again." You say, "Well, yeah, he drops the F-bomb, he does all these things." Folks, nobody's perfect. And I'm telling you, you know, there may be times you stub your toe and you drop some bad words. But I'm telling you, it's time we look not at a man, but we look to Jesus, that He's going to help us, but He's going to use a man. And I'm telling you, I've seen it. I've seen a radical conversion with Trump and Melania in the days ahead. A major move of God is coming to America. A major outpouring of the spirit of God is coming to America beyond anybody's comprehension, bigger than anything we've ever seen before. Jesus is standing at the door. I talked to Maurice Sklar on the phone today. He called me, and we were talking about when we believe the rapture of the church is. He said, "Brandon, I believe it'll be in the next—before the next five years." We've gone over things. When do you think it'll be? My answer to him was, "You know what I've seen was as the Lord said right now." I told Maurice, I said, "What we're praying for, what we're believing for right now is this three-and-a-half-year window going into the next Shemitah cycle. The next Shemitah cycle starts in 2028, going into 2029." And that's what the Lord told me about. I believe the rapture of the church will start at the end of a Shemitah cycle, getting ready for the next seven years. And a Shemitah cycle will be the beginning of a tribulation and the end of a tribulation—a seven-year cycle and a Shemitah cycle. And then this Shemitah cycle will end in three and a half years. So we just have a window. And the Lord said, "What will you do with this window, this extended window? I've given you a window of opportunity and all you need is a sliver of time." All you need, Brandon—and people are like, "Well, we have ten, 20, 30, 40 years." Folks, I don't believe we have that long. Even if it's three years, people are disappointed. They're like, "I want him to come back in 2025." Folks, if he comes back right now, there will be billions of people go to hell. There will be billions of people go to hell if he comes back right now. We must have a harvest of souls, leaving the 99 and going after the one. There are many of you praying grandmas. There are many of you praying mamas and daddies out there that are believing God for your unsaved loved ones, for your children, for your wayward wives, your wayward husbands, for them to come back and serve the Lord Jesus Christ. And I believe God's giving us that window right now. There's a great shaking to awaken. And I believe as we see the wealth of the wicked laid up for the righteous with these crypto bills and the foundation with gold and silver and these things coming, I'm telling you all, this will be the greatest wealth transfer we could have ever hoped to imagine or think. What is it for, though? I want to say that over and over again. What is this for? This is for getting the gospel out so that we can reach... It's going to take billions, if not trillions, of dollars to preach the gospel throughout the whole world, and then the end will come. We're fulfilling what the scripture—Jesus told us the fulfilling of the scripture—that we should preach the gospel to every tribe, every tongue, everybody, and then the end will come. We must speak to the globe all the way around and say, from North Korea to Japan to China to Venezuela to all of it, that we have the greatest move of God all throughout Africa and throughout Asia, from the Middle East or whatever, that we've ever seen before. And I believe we're seeing it right now. We're seeing the first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation of it. And it's exciting to be a part of it. But, you know, we see that it feels like we're on a powder keg when it comes to crypto. We see Bitcoin going up to all-time highs of $120,000 per share. That is crazy. I told a dear sister in the Lord, she helped me one time, and she was asking me where she wanted to put some money she got from her life insurance from her husband passing, or whatever people try to tell you. They said, "Hey, what do you do with your money? What do you do?" I said, "I'm not a financial adviser. I'm not a financial adviser." People are always asking me that kind of stuff. I said, "You must follow the voice of God for yourself." But on this occasion, I felt prompted because it was a widow, to tell this individual what to do with their finances. And I said, "This is what the Lord told me. Now you pray about it." So they came up and said, "We didn't feel a peace about that." I said, "Well, okay. Well, then I missed it. You just go on." But the exact thing the Lord said when it was down here, if she would have taken the money what the Lord said, which they had, it would have turned over $14 million within the last seven months. $14 million increase. And I give all the glory to God about some of that stuff, folks, because, you know, it's hearing in part, seeing in part. But that was a chance. What I'm trying to tell you all, that was a chance for a wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous to... I don't even know, that kind of harvest is ginormous, you know, but it's exactly what the Lord said. So the individual said, "I put it in this," and that was at like $70 at one time, and now it's all the way down to like 18. It crashed big time. So you cannot be led by your flesh, but you're led by the spirit and what the spirit of the Lord is telling you to do. Now, I'm not here to ever tell you you're missing it. That's not my place. My job is to always pray that God gives every single one of us the ability to hear him, because that's what his word says: "My sheep will know my voice, and a stranger's voice they'll not follow." Now, familiar spirits try to come in, demonic spirits try to come in and cause confusion. That's why we get into this word every single day. And the more you get into this word and you have a foundation of the word of God inside of your heart, the more "he abide in me and my words remain in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done unto you." I believe that this was a for-instance, after I started doing the math on it because I had Diana do it for me, telling me what the return was because I remember the prophetic word. So when I brought this up to the individual, and after I said, you feel sorry for folks because a $14 million increase is a lot of money. I mean, that's life-changing wealth, and they missed out on it. That's why I said there's great opportunities in the days ahead. If you don't act whenever I tell you to act and stay in sync with me, hearing my breath, hearing my heart like a clock ticks—a fine watch, as a clock ticks, a Swiss watch—it's perfect, precise, on-target prayers. Hearing his voice, knowing when he tells you to do something and following it, saying, "Father, I'm staying in sync with you. I'm staying vertical with you and you'll tell me what's coming." And so people miss it, and that's why I was trying to tell you that was a for-instance, and it's sad because it happens. It happens, and so you go, "Bummer, man. Well, you do your best, and we all are doing our best." But I'm telling you, that's what's about to happen for a lot of people. And a great missed opportunity will be...
